title: 比...更
prompt_en: Practice comparatives with -er and more + than.
prompt_zh: 练习比较级：-er + than / more + than。
description: 掌握比较级结构和常见不规则变化。
knowledge_points: 比较级 er than more than better
teaching_markdown:
## 比较级构成
- 短词 + er：big → bigger, fast → faster
- 以 y 结尾 → ier：happy → happier, easy → easier
- 长词 + more：more interesting, more beautiful
- 不规则：good→better, bad→worse, far→farther

## 比较句型
- A is bigger than B. (A比B大)
- A is more expensive than B.

## than 后的代词
- She is taller than me. (口语)
- She is taller than I am. (正式)

## 常见错误
- ❌ He is more taller. → ✅ He is taller. (不重复)
- ❌ She is better than me at sports. → ✅ She is better at sports than me.

title: 最...的
prompt_en: Practice superlatives with the -est and the most.
description: 掌握最高级结构和用法。
knowledge_points: 最高级 the est the most best
teaching_markdown:
## 最高级构成
- the + 短词 + est：the biggest, the fastest
- the most + 长词：the most beautiful
- 不规则：good→best, bad→worst

## 最高级句型
- This is the best restaurant in town.
- She is the tallest in our class.

## in vs of
- in + 地点/范围：the best in the world
- of + 同类群体：the tallest of all students

## 常见错误
- ❌ She is best student. → ✅ the best student
- ❌ the most happiest → ✅ the happiest

title: 有...在...
prompt_en: Practice there is/are to describe existence.
description: 掌握there is/are的肯定/否定/疑问形式。
knowledge_points: there is there are 存在 位置
teaching_markdown:
## There is / There are
- There is + 单数/不可数：There is a book on the desk.
- There are + 复数：There are two cats in the garden.

## 否定与疑问
- 否定：There isn't / There aren't
- 疑问：Is there...? / Are there...?

## some vs any
- 肯定句用 some：There are some apples.
- 否定/疑问用 any：There aren't any students.

## 相关词汇
- empty (空的) / full (满的) / crowded (拥挤的)
- available (可用的) / vacant (空着的) / occupied (被占用的)

title: 在...里/上/旁边
prompt_en: Practice prepositions of place: in/on/at/under/next to.
description: 掌握常用位置介词的用法区别。
knowledge_points: 介词 位置 in on at under next to
teaching_markdown:
## 常用位置介词
| 介词 | 含义 | 例句 |
|------|------|------|
| in | 在里面 | in the box |
| on | 在上面(接触) | on the table |
| at | 在某点 | at the door |
| under | 在下面 | under the chair |
| next to | 在旁边 | next to the park |
| between | 在两者间 | between A and B |
| behind | 在后面 | behind the door |
| above | 在上方 | above the door |
| below | 在下方 | below zero |
| beside | 在旁边 | beside me |

## 常见错误
- ❌ The cat is in the table. → ✅ on the table
- ❌ The bank is in the store and the hospital. → ✅ between

title: 和...一样
knowledge_points: 同级比较 as as too enough 程度
teaching_markdown:
## as...as 同级比较
- as + 形容词 + as：He is as tall as me.
- 否定：not as...as / not so...as

## too + 形容词 + to do
- This coffee is too hot to drink. (太...而不能)
- too = 超过可接受的程度

## 形容词 + enough
- big enough (够大) — enough 在形容词后
- enough money (足够的钱) — enough 在名词前

## 常见错误
- ❌ This is enough big. → ✅ big enough
- ❌ too much hot → ✅ too hot

title: 怎么做的
prompt_en: Practice adverbs of manner: quickly / carefully / well.
description: 掌握方式副词的构成和位置。
knowledge_points: 副词 方式 quickly well carefully 描述
teaching_markdown:
## 方式副词构成
- 形容词 + ly：quick → quickly, careful → carefully
- y → ily：happy → happily, easy → easily
- 不规则：good → well, fast → fast (同形), hard → hard

## 副词位置
- 动词后或句尾：She sings well. / He drives carefully.
- 方式副词一般不放动词和宾语之间

## 常用方式副词
| 副词 | 形容词 | 含义 |
|------|--------|------|
| well | good | 好地 |
| quickly | quick | 快速地 |
| carefully | careful | 小心地 |
| slowly | slow | 慢慢地 |
| easily | easy | 容易地 |
| happily | happy | 开心地 |
| hard | hard | 努力地 |
| fast | fast | 很快地 |
| gently | gentle | 温柔地 |
| smoothly | smooth | 顺利地 |
